reviews.title: Some do not work
reviews.text:
I haven’t tried them all yet, but I’ve used four so far.
1. Didn’t work on either earpiece
2. Stopped working on one side and then stopped working on both sides
3. Same as #2
4. Only one side worked. Still using this one.

reviews.title: Only one pair worked(for two months )
reviews.text: They didnt  fit into my phone. (Loose)

reviews.title: These are junk dont waste your money.
reviews.text: These are junk. Do not purchase. Bought for my middle school class thinking I could seek them cheaply and I have trouble giving them away. Many are broken right of of the package. Absolutely waste of money.

reviews.title: Garbage do not purchase
reviews.text: Extremely cheaply made. The wires are super long and tangle within moments of use. I bought them for my son because he always loses them but he hasn't had a pair last long enough to lose. They're junk don't waste ur money.

reviews.title: Quantity over Quality
reviews.text: You can only hear sound from one side for some of the earbuds, and they're pretty fragile. Trying to untangle one of them ended up with me ripping off some of the plastic and exposing the wires accidentally. I also only received 91 earbuds instead of the promised 100. I would buy again though, just because it's so cheap.

title: Sony Extra Bass Bluetooth Headphones, Best Wireless Sports Earbuds with Mic/Microphone, IPX4 Splashproof Stereo Comfort Gym Running Workout up to 8.5 Hour Battery, Black (International Version)
description: MDR-XB50BS/B Wireless Sports Bluetooth In-ear Headphones Rain or shine, these wireless sports headphones are more than an accessory for your active lifestyle and smartphone. They keep you connected to phone calls, favorite music and even your workout playlist. Lightweight design and comfortable fit make sure these headphones keep up the pace on your daily commute or routine at the gym.
features: Connect wirelessly - Bluetooth connectivity lets you listen for up to 8. 5 hours without wires getting in your way.
Be ready for splashes - Durable IPX4 design keeps the music going, even when you run in light rain.

Hear the beat, feel the power - EXTRA BASS sound gives you more motivation, whether you’re at the gym or on the street. Enhanced low frequencies make music sound more powerful, so you feel energized and driven.

Listen anywhere, do anything - Never be without your music again. Bluetooth connectivity lets you run, jump, kick and more, without wires holding you back. Ergonomic arc supporters keep the headphones securely in position while you exercise.

A built-in microphone for hands-free calls - You don’t have to pause your workout to take that important phone call. With a built-in microphone and Bluetooth connectivity, you can make and answer calls wirelessly from your smartphone.
Connectivity Technology: Bluetooth, NFC

reviews.title: Unusably uncomfortable
reviews.text:
Feels premium in the hand.
Sound amazing for in-ear headphones at this price point.
Gets unbearably uncomfortable after 10 minutes in my ears. I have normal sized ears, but the shoulder of even the smallest the ear hooks dig in and hurt terribly really quickly. Super disappointing, as the sound quality is really good for the price. Returning and continuing to use my $17 Anker buds that are as comfortable as can be (though, admittedly they have anemic bass)

reviews.title: High quality ear buds
reviews.text:
These work great on my iPhone but do not connect to my laptop. I tried everything and they won’t work on my laptop at all. They connected in seconds to my iPhone though.

The sound quality is crisp and clear. The battery life has been great and I’m overall happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Great value for the money
reviews.text: Are use this for the gym they’re pretty comfortable and they kind of stay in my ears were none of the others do. I must have small inner ears ,but the sound is fine I haven’t spoken to anybody on the phone yet to hear if I sound clear, but as far as the music goes it does the job!

reviews.title: Fantastic headphones
reviews.text: I’m just now ordering my second pair. Original pair still work, but the cord is finally stiff and cracking after thousands of miles cycling, hiking, and hundreds of hours in the gym. I see a lot of people complaining about the mic, I don’t think I’ve ever used that function so I can’t speak to that.  However, the sound quality is better than my iPod Pros, and they still sound great at 25mph on the bike, I’ve never once had an issue with wind noise or of them falling out.  Great value for the money.

reviews.title: Handy
reviews.text: Good for gym or anywhere.

reviews.title: Neckbands are fine, but earhooks are useless for me
reviews.text:
The neckbands worked fine, and all items gripped my gen 2 AirPods okay, but the earhooks were not even a little useful for me.

I’m used to wearing headphones with integral earhooks, and loved the fit of those, but these add-on earhooks for Airpods do not have the right amount of rigidity, nor is it easy enough to rotate and position them appropriately with respect to the AirPod stem so that the combined geometry of the two would ever align to my ear. Because of those two factors, they simultaneously made my AirPods look kind of stupid while at the same time actually making the fit/hold even worse; they seemed almost more likely to fall out with the hooks than without them.

reviews.title: Poor quality silicone that easily tears
reviews.text: I didn't know that silicone could actually tear like this stuff has when I removed them from my AirPods. I'm past the return window and these literally ripped after about a month and a half of use when I was trying to slide them off the AirPods. Look elsewhere!

reviews.title: Refurb- came coated with previous owner's ear wax - Yuck !  UPDATE !
reviews.text:
non hygenic refurb process disappoints- didn't try the super gross earbuds

UPDATE - I spent the extra $20 for a new set. these have issues. the earbuds turn on by themselves in the case and:
1.) hijack the phone connection
2.) use up all the battery, then charge up, and then run down the battery...so when you go to use the earbuds, the batteries are drained in earbuds and the case

other reviewers write of similar problem

skullcandy chat says they think the case needs to be replaced- I can send them in and wait a few weeks for their warranty repair. but it appears these issues are in the design

or return to amazon within the return period.

yes, that.

reviews.title: Nice sound
reviews.text: These have become my favorite earbuds love the voice activated commands

reviews.title: Stopped Charging
reviews.text: Stopped charging after a month. Return window just expired a few days ago. Now I have to deal with returning through Skullcandy

reviews.title: Comfort!
reviews.text: So the sound quality is good, battery life is good but for me the most important point is they are comfortable. I've been through a LOT of ear buds in search of something that I can wear for several hours without my ears starting to hurt and these are them! Charging case doesn't feel very substantial, but since I don't need to charge them every couple of hours I can live with it.

reviews.title: Interesting app
reviews.text: I've been using these earbuds for several weeks now, and they're as good as any pair I have. And I have several. They connect without issue and have good, clear sound. If you're looking for the intricasies of fine tuning, how good is the base and all that, I'm not the gal for you. However, I think music sounds great, and they're perfect for listening to YouTube vids on my computer and audio books on my phone. The app is interesting. At first I thought I could talk directly to my buds. "Hey, Skullcandy!" (First earbuds I've had with voice control.) But you have to use the app for that feature. Not quite as convenient in my opinion, although perhaps I was expecting too much. The controls are not touch, but require clicking on the individual buds to control them. You can also control them through the app, though. Instructions are clear and easy to understand. I was up and running in minutes. All in all, I think they are excellent and definitely worth the price tag.

reviews.title: OK Headphones
reviews.text: I think these headphones are more like 3.5 stars but I rounded up.  I have kind of a small head for an adult female, and still these headphones were too tight.  Usually I can wear headphones made for kids but not these.  These are definitely for smaller heads and small ears since the ear cups get painful after a while since they aren't big enough to fully cover my ears.  The sound is o.k., nothing to write home about, but for the price (as of this review these head phones cost $19.44) I think they are worth it.  Great for kids, not so good for adults, even if you are a pinhead.

reviews.title: High quality headphones
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 4th grade child to use at school. It is hard to find headphones with plug-ins and that aren't wireless. For my son, the ones with a plug are best to use his school issued ipad. These are sturdy and I'm hoping they last the entire school year.

reviews.title: Not really for large heads.
reviews.text: All the talk about "classroom" and "child's" in the Amazon listing really means "this is a small headset." It's not big enough for me. I have a large (7 3/4) head and this thing actually hurts my ears (presses on them too hard). If you need headphones for a child then this would work just fine. Not for me.

reviews.title: Good headphones for kids
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 6 yr old. They fit her great and don’t get so loud that they can damage her ears.

reviews.title: Work well for online meetings
reviews.text: My school district is purchasing a set of 50 for my yearbook classroom where my science students spend a fair amount of time.  This one was purchased to try out at home.  Sound quality is good and mic quality isn't bad, either.  After wearing them for an hour, my ears really need a break, though - but I have a pretty big head; these should be more comfortable for my middle schoolers.  I wish they came with a blue accent as an option, though.  The ones at school will have the green accents.

title: 1MORE ComfoBuds Mini Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Earbuds, in-Ear Headphones with Stereo Sound, Bluetooth 5.2 Headset with 4 Mics, Clear Calls, Wireless Charging, Soothing Sound, Waterproof, White
features: True Quiet in a Small Package: We put 1MORE’s proprietary QuietMax active noise cancellation technology into the compact body of the ComfoBuds Mini to provide true quiet. With up to 40dB noise cancellation depth, you can get a more immersive listening experience. And the earbuds allow you to switch between multiple listening modes to fit different scenarios.

Smaller Size, Increased Comfort: The ComfoBuds Mini is the world’s smallest and lightest ANC earbuds. A single earbud weighs only 3.7g, and with the extra tiny size and ergonomic design, you’ll get an “invisible” but super comfortable wearing experience. Four sizes of silicone ear tips are provided to get the perfect fit for your ear and better audio performance.

Tiny Mics, Crystal-Clear Calls: Two mics hidden in the tiny body of earbud work together to filter out background noise, then accurately pick up your voice and amplify it, keeping your voice sounding clear, even when calling in a carnival parade.

Astounding Audio Performance: Tiny in size, but no compromise on sound quality. A 7mm dynamic driver produces a rich, powerful, authentic sound that is usually reserved for big bulky headphones. And the integration of SoundID technology allows you to get your perfect sound that fits your ears and preference.
Convenient Wireless Charging: The ComfoBuds Mini TWS earbuds can power up super easily on the go with Qi-compatible wireless charging, say goodbye to tangled cables.

reviews.title: Mini, but Mighty
reviews.text:
Look, we know you aren't here for premium sound quality if you're looking at the tiniest earbuds and in this price range. That being said, these do still sound quite nice! There's a lot of oomph for such a small package. Unless you're used to professional grade sound equipment, these will cover most anyone's sound needs.

SMALL EAR HAVERS! I have been on a quest to find comfy earbuds. So far, these have come the closest. I can wear them for like 2 hours with minimal discomfort. This is a huge upgrade from "most cause physical pain near immediately". When placed correctly, they're pretty solid. I couldn't shake them out. They did come loose a handful of times and needed to be readjusted, but in comparison to the others needing that every 5 minutes? I'll take it.

They say they have ANC, but honestly, I'm not so sure. In my personal experience, turning ANC on didn't actually cancel any noise. It just brought the bass out. Unless I just can't get the right fit, the ANC mode is effectively just a "make the music sound better" button.

The drawback here is that you can only use ANC if both buds are in. Not usually a problem, unless you want to pop one in to listen to music and leave the other ear open for communication. The make the music sound better button won't do anything with just one bud.

reviews.title: Basically perfect, fantastic wind ANC, perfect case
reviews.text:
I needed a replacement for my Galaxy buds pro's that have the fatal ANC "roar in one ear" that Samsung won't fix, and they don't stay in the ear. Bring an absolutely ENORMOUS fan of the 1more comfobuds z (the single best sleep focused earbuds at any price) I liked that these are also small, the case shape is wonderful (flip top, tiny, wireless charger) and they're relatively inexpensive.

The sound quality uses 1more's app to do a "sounds" hearing preference test. I would prefer a proper EQ option but it works well enough. I prefer real audiophile iem's and headphones, but enjoyed the Galaxy buds on bass boost, they almost hit like planar magnetics. These are about 80% there. They're totally serviceable, with the only standout being a pretty good technical performance, with genuinely solid imaging and separation. They absolutely do need the soundID set up though, I hate the stock tuning. For tiny little things they are, I am perfectly happy with the sound quality when I want music on my bike or public transit.

The ANC is stellar. They have a specific mode for wind reduction that downright curbstomps Samsung and apple. If you ride a bike, you need 1more ANC buds. The transparency mode is great too, very natural sounding. It doesn't have that "talk and it switches to transparency" gimmick, but I found it obnoxious on Samsung.

Touch controls are easily customized and no "single touch" feature means you don't accidentally press anything readjusting or putting them in. Auto pauses when you take one out, your can use just one or the other no problem

The app features depend on the product but these are meant to be usable for sleeping, do they come preloaded with a library of sleep/ambient sounds. I just use my own but it's a nice feature. I can easily fall asleep with them in and I'm a very picky side sleeper, but I do prefer the absolutely microscopic comfobuds z's.

The stock eartips did bother me a bit, they have a little ridge from the mold that irritated my ears after a few hours of use. They have a very odd mounting system that I was only able to find one option for, spinfit 1025 tips are shallow enough to fit and still let the case close (the wells for the eartips is a bit to shallow, id like it if they addressed this on a revision) so if you don't like the tips, spinfit 1025's.

The case magnets that hold the buds in are hilariously strong. Your have to SMACK it to dislodge them. Very nice detail. The case size is tiny and perfectly shaped to slide into pockets, with a flip top that you can open one handed

For being so small they also stay put well. Not perfect, but I can work out or mow the lawn, an impossible task of the Galaxy buds pro.

Overall though, these things rock. They're exactly what I need as a paramedic who also rides a bicycle. 1more is a serious brand with some seriously well thought out products at extremely competitive prices. I can sleep on my side with a podcast and still be able to wake up for a call, they crush wind nose when I'm riding my bike, they sound perfectly adequately tuned with impressive imaging (once you run the sound id feature once) and the case is (slightly too shallow recessions for the eartips aside) very nice in the hand and perfectly shaped.

Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Bought this twice- love it
reviews.text:
I bought a pair of these about 4 ish months ago and they’re great - a terrific value for the price point.

2 weeks ago the earbuds disappeared into the ether (thanks cats) and they needed to be replaced-I explored getting something different but the Comfobuds minis check all the boxes.

The only drawback is you have to download the app to your phone and your earbuds need to be paired to your phone in order for you to check the power levels of the earbuds and the charging case.

reviews.title: Great quality, great price
reviews.text: I have a pair of Apple AirPods Pro, which I like well enough.  I bought these after reading a review somewhere.  I love them.  The sound quality and noise cancellation seem to work as well as the Air Pods, and they actually seem to stay in place better.  I’d definitely buy them again.

reviews.title: I'm not keen on the cover material
reviews.text:
While the Arae Electronic Organizer does what it says, its implementation isn't great.

The double layers of this product has one and a half flap of elastic bands to hold bundled up wires, that's 18 spots total. The rest are two large pockets and a small pocket. That's plenty of room to carry most charging accessories that you'd have with you if you were equipped with tablets and phones. For laptops and cameras, you'll need other solutions. Even action camera chargers may have a hard time fitting in this slim product.

It's not a problem that this thing is pretty much made out of nylon from the outside in but the material that makes up the exterior of this product makes it look cheap. It's a rough, synthetic material that just makes it a bit cheap looking. I think cloth or leather would have been a better choice.

In addition, the zipper sticks, making it hard to quickly open this up to retrieve your wires for charging.

reviews.title: Case closed
reviews.text:
It's pretty amazing how much this will hold and still close up properly. I am using it for many cables and some adapters, and I am also keeping those little instruction manuals that come with everything in one of the zipper pouches. You can keep a lot of cables and adapters in this, and it will still zip up and be small enough for travel.
I like this case a lot.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected
reviews.text: Water proof? Not going to try that. This is super slim so you can't really fit a whole lot in. Wires, maybe... but devices, like portable routers, not exactly. Slim portable chargers, sure. Higher capacity batteries, nope. Won't fit anything more than two iPhones thick.

reviews.title: No More Ziplock Bags
reviews.text: This is such a better alternative to tossing cables into a ziplock bag.  The nice bag with zipper allows me to keep everything in one place.  I wished the compartments were a little wider, but it's easy to just use two compartments. Nice quality bag, once I get spares I would just pack these with a spare ready and be ready to go anytime.  Nice organization addition to my travel gear.

reviews.title: Handy little case
reviews.text: Does a good job at cutting down on cable clutter. I took a black Sharpie and identified the various cords by writing abbreviations on the cloth stretch band that secures the cords. It also helps organize miscellaneous adapters and charging units. Not sure how long it will last but for organizing cords and small electronic items it’s a good buy.

title: Monolith M1060C Closed Back Planar Magnetic Over-Ear Headphones, Low Distortion And Perfectly Balanced Sound
description: The Monolith M1060C planar headphones are the perfect way to experience your music collection. The M1060C features a completely redesigned and engineered planar driver, producing a detailed aural landscape in a closed back enclosure. Spectacular imaging, low distortion, and perfectly balanced sound make the Monolith M1060C a true audiophile listening experience.
features: Planar Drivers: Not your typical headphone driver! The planar driver in the M1060C has been completely redesigned and engineered versus the driver found in the M1060.
Several enhancements have been made, including a new symmetrical magnet structure that allows the planar driver to be much more efficient in a closed back enclosure.

Closed Back Design: Outside noise stays out and only the music stays in! The 1060C delivers excellent audio isolation, allowing the sonic landscape to not be disturbed by the outside world, and the outside to not be disturbed by your music.
This makes the M1060C the perfect audiophile choice for those that may need to listen in less than silent environments.

Comfort: The Monolith M1060C has been engineered to be comfortable for extended listening sessions. Large, comfy earpads made of faux leather and a padded headband are designed to keep you comfortable as you listen.

reviews.title: These sound pretty great, if you get lucky
reviews.text:
I got the m1060c.
I got lucky, my pair was good. I didn't have 5k ring.
Frequency response is kinda flat though, so if you're into that, go for it. I found other, supposedly lesser, headphones more fun.
The base is deep, but not overwhelming .. and goes on for miles.
Mids are pretty good, though I like them being more forward.
Highs are clear and nice.
Construction is kinda meh, but solid enough to last a few years, but not sure beyond that.
The headband is kinda silly and cheapo.
Pads .. I found them exceptionally comfortable, but your mileage will vary.
Cable is nice though!
Quite hefty as a headphone.
They aren't exactly closed, or at least not very good at isolation.
Respond well to EQ, seem to have plenty of tunability.

Recommended if you like it flatish and want to try a planar.

reviews.title: I liked them
reviews.text:
They were decent with an amp, without they sounded a little thin. Weight was around 580 grams without the cord.
I opened the box and it looked like lots of spots inside, I thought it was a return and maybe someone sprayed something inside of it. Amazon sent me another pair but that box also had spots but less. I shined a dark light on it and this is what I observed. Maybe mildew, I don't know. 3 1/2 - 4 stars, could be a 5 star, they do feel very good and this is comparing them to the Mr Speaker Aeon Flow closed backs.

Pros
Really nice Bass
Sounded good for gaming very good imaging
Very comfortable deep pads

Cons
Maybe weight
Too bright for me

reviews.title: Great sounding Cans, though build quality is less than spectacular
reviews.text:
Love the wonderful sound of these cans however, some things to note before purchase:

1) Very Heavy (Probably the heaviest I've ever worn.
2) Cups swivel 360 degrees. This can tangle the wires easily if you are not careful.
3) Mine came with a defective cable with an intermittent right side connection. I've requested a replacement. Discovered that the only ones making a replacement for this is Monoprice .. Though they do offer an upgrade cable for around $35.00 that looks far more substantial.
4) Wood ear cups are stained very dark (walnut color). So much so that you cant really tell there is a beautiful zebra wood pattern. Would suggest that manufacturer offer non-stained version.
5) Metal frame is a little unwieldy (read large ) and somewhat flimsy. A new frame design should be considered.

All that said, they sound wonderful , so the other faults must be taken into consideration along with their reasonable price.

reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text: The headband is an abomination. It hurt my head within 15 minutes of wearing.  The reason  I'm keeping it is because of how good it sounds. It's been the best closed backs I've tried, compared to some of the best rated ones like the dt177x go. I order a zmf pilot pad to fix the headband issue. All in all this headphone delivers a well detailed performance,  and if you can get past the comfort issue, you're in for a treat.

reviews.title: Versatile
reviews.text:
Yes. Versatile. These come from the factory as closed headphones and sound good in their stock form but where they really shine is if you convert them to open back headphones. You can google "1060C open mod" and you'll find a couple different companies selling the plates to mod these to open. The driver was designed for an open back headphone, so that is why they sound better when you open them up. There are ways to leave the wood cups on and turn them into a semi-open headphone as well and that will give you the benefit of improved SQ with a little less sound leakage but I think it's best to just switch between closed and open. Anyway, I've really enjoyed having the ability to switch from open or closed depending on the environment I'm in. Super useful. That said, I probably won't be taking these to the coffee shop with me, they're a bit too heavy for that.

As far as the headband is concerned, the other reviewers griping about it are correct, it sucks. However, I don't think it's bad as some of them have made out. Maybe it just works with my head shape but I've worn them for several hours at a time without any issues. I plan on getting the ZMF Pilot Pad ($30) and I've read that that basically solves any comfort issues with these.

The cable looks and feels just fine but beware that it is a little microphonic. I ended up buying a replacement for $17 on Amazon and that solved the problem.

All in all, I think these are great headphones. There are a couple of issues but they're solvable and once you solve them (ZMF Pilot Pad + new cable), they are outstanding in both their sound and comfort.

reviews.title: Cheap Buys Cheap
reviews.text: Not sure what I expected for so little, so shame on me. I'll tell you these made my 9-year-old's ears hurt. I'm not sure how they could cancel any noise, as there is no buffer. I tried the ones she put on and they are very uncomfortable. Returning.

reviews.title: Great product and great price.
reviews.text: We bought a pack of these for my son because he goes through headphones crazy fast; since we bought these, he's still on the first pair. We will be buying more in the future if we have to.

reviews.title: They are priced low enough that a defective or marginal one doesn't sour the price.
reviews.text: Quality control could be a little better, but the price for the multipack is tough to beat.

reviews.title: For the cost… I am super happy with them.
reviews.text: I’m giving these earbuds five stars because they exceed my expectations when they only cost seventy cents each. I find it hard to complain about these, especially considering the cost. The sound is quite adequate for such earbuds. I use these in a classroom setting for kids who either cannot afford earbuds or forget there is at home. They are individually packaged. Nice assortment of colors. Though they are being sold by a US company, I do not show where they are made. I can only assume they are made in China.

reviews.title: Great Sound Just Wish they had a Microphone
reviews.text: Fun colors and love this type of ear plug over the cone shaped style. Listening to music on my phone sounds great  but I wish they had a microphone so I could easily answer calls. Now I have to unplug the earphones when the phone starts to ring and then re-plug after I'm done on the call. I guess they are really designed for use on exclusive music players. The listing is confusing because it says "Bluetooth" which they don't have, but the wire is about 4ft. long so your music unit can easily be kept anywhere convenient. No volume control either so that has to be handled on your phone/music player.

title: BURGA Airpod Hardcase Compatible with Apple Airpods 2 & 1 Charging Case, Crystal Blue Teal Turqoise Marble Cute Case for Women, Protective Hard Plastic Case Cover
features: 🎧 COMPATIBLE DEVICE - Case fits perfectly with regular and wireless charging case for AirPods 1st & Airpods 2nd (Airpods case skin only, Air Pods and Charging case is not included).
💥 360° FULL PROTECTION - Fully covered design protects your Air Pod against daily bumps, drops and scratches.
✅ CONVENIENT DESIGN - Easy installation and precise cut-out offers a free access to the charging pot. You can charge your AirPods without removing case cover.

🌟 HIGH QUALITY – only premium materials and inks are used on these ultra thin hard shell plastic cases – it is guaranteed that prints will not fade or peel away. This case is highly scratch resistant; case will not age after using for a long time.
💎 UNCONVENTIONAL STYLE – slim and elegant, this hard shell case protects the device without bulking it out. Its glossy finish looks especially chic and trendy. It is a perfect gift for any occasion.

reviews.title: Love It!
reviews.text: I love the fit and the look.

reviews.title: It’s not worth it
reviews.text: Not worth the money. L

reviews.title: Pensé protegía más el estuche, pero no es muy bueno
reviews.text: No es muy bueno para proteger si es muy lindo pero no tiene nada de silicona para proteger de golpes y caídas. Solo es bonito.

reviews.title: Wanted to love it.
reviews.text:
Like others, the top slipped off because it arrived “cracked”. I never dropped the case. I thought by snapping the pieces back together it would keep it secure, but it was only temporary. The top would constantly fall off until I looked down one day and it was gone. So unfortunately it’s not worth the price, but it looked amazing while it lasted.

I would not recommend.

reviews.title: Love.
reviews.text: Love this airpod case and I love their phone cases as well this is a great company. Very pretty designs and extremely durable too. I believe they’re from Lithuania and they have fast shipping. Also the seller was lightning fast to respond to my inquiry. A++

title: Youkamoo 4 Pin XLR Balanced Male Compatible for Hifiman HE4XX, HE-400i Headphones 8 Core Braided Silver Plated Replacement Audio Upgrade Cable (2 x 3.5mm Version)

Dual 3.5mm Male

For HE4XX, HE-400i (2 x 3.5mm Version)

reviews.title: Nice cable
reviews.text:
Pros:
Not to expensive
Very nice looking cable
Well put together
Very supple

Cons:
None at the moment, will update if something comes up

Other thoughts
I am using Hifiman Ananda' with this cable hooked up to a Schiit Jotunheim, hooked up to a MHDT Istanbul, hooked up via USB from my monster manchine running Windows 11
It sounds lushes kind of like a full figured woman

reviews.title: Youkamoo
reviews.text: Youkamoo must translate to extreme quality for pocket change .

reviews.title: Just pull the trigger you will thank me later
reviews.text:
Wow! I own hifiman arya headphones attached to topping d90 DAC & a90 amp.
I replace the default cable with this in the sound Improvement is incredible! It may have to do with the fact that it is an XLR connection as opposed to the quarter inch connection....

Nonetheless this has made these headphones sound even more incredible

reviews.title: Sounds, looks & feels very nice
reviews.text: It's just what you'd hope, might look a little better in person. Sound is excellent. Connections are just right.

reviews.title: Sweeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeet!
reviews.text:
These headphone cables just flat out look sweeeet! I bought them for their looks alone and to be honest, they do NOT make any sonic difference in my music and they should NOT! That sort of drivel is the rote of the dreaded frAudiophile. I listen to music, not equipment. But I do look at my equipment and these cables look great!

Buy them if you want to class up your 'phones. I did!

Trust me. I know what I'm doin' when I'm reviewin'.

title: SZHTFX Invisible Earbuds Small Mini Wireless Bluetooth Earpiece Phone Discreet Earbud for Music, Home, Work
features: 【CONNECTIVITY STABLE AND POWERFUL CHARGING CASE】 Our bluetooth ear phones provide stable and seamless connectivity with Bluetooth V5.2 and high sensitivity antenna enabled,deliver true Hi-Fi sound, natural and authentic sound performance with focus on getting a clear midrange and a balanced bass and treble performance.Fantastic TWS (True Wireless Stereo ) technology makes you enjoy music without any cord troubles,offers an extended 33ft range.

【EXRTA LONG WORKIGN HOURS】 This wireless headphone can work 4-6 hours continuously for music or talking, and the charging case built in 1200mAH battery can provide extra 10-15 times extra power if fully charged, so the super musical earbuds power can last more than 48 hours. Stand by time up to 150 hours.

【DESIGNED FOR SPORTS AND SIMPLE OPERATION】These mini earbuds is carefully designed according to ear geometry to ensure secure and comfort wearing.Light weight,anti-drop and sweat-proof, especially designed for sports as running,hiking,gym exercise.Simply one press to answer or reject phone calls,Bluetooth pairing,power on/off, play/pause music/video etc.Built-in Mic, great for hands-free calling, listening to music, news,or working use.

【SUPER COMPATIBILITY AND QUICK CONNECTION】 Sport headsets Compatible with all bluetooth -enabled devices; Such as iPhone,Samsung, BlackBerry, HTC, iPad Pro and any other Bluetooth-enabled equipements.Easy and qucik to connect,you will in your music world within 3 seconds.

SZHTFX provides 12 months hassle-free warranty to ensure the enjoyment of your purchase.In case of defective products, please contact SZHTFX Direct.Contact: Log in to Amazon's status--Your Orders--SZHTFX Direct --Ask a question

reviews.title: Good sound and battery life, touch activated button bad
reviews.text: Overall, this is a good earbud. However, if you hold it in your hand you run the risk of your skin/touch activating the voice commands, it hears a random snippet of what you’re saying and it calls someone from your address book that kinda sorta sounds like what you had said and you have to quickly try to hang up as your phone dials someone you haven’t talked to in 5 years, you whispering “oh f*** nononono” over and over until it hangs up and you pray it didn’t actually connect on their side but it does every damn time and then you’re forced into a conversation of pleasantries. So like...yeah it works well, good range but the touch activated button was a big no from me.

reviews.title: Can wear one at a time. Lasts a long time.
reviews.text: Absolutely adore these. Not one person looked at it in my ear and I can use one at a time. Love these!
